result.status_detail: 보안 경고 toast rendered with 차단 text — PII blocked by engine

notes: Wave 0 rollback regression — poe block path restored. Tab title changed to '보안 정책 - 접근 차단' and toast displayed '보안 경고: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)' confirming engine intercept fired and warning rendered post-rollback to a3a40d7. Required F5 refresh after submit to surface the persistent warning toast (initial post-submit page was blank).
